Hair and grooming: Wears a short, textured crop with a slight natural wave at the crown, paired with a neatly trimmed but dense three-day stubble that shows.. Body build: Lean and naturally athletic build with proportionate shoulders, carrying himself.. Wardrobe cues: sage green linen overshirt layered over a white tee. Concrete physical action: setting a delivery bag on the counter and turning to camera. Posture and stance: Maintains a relaxed but engaged stance with weight shifted slightly to one hip, shoulders dropped naturally, using small, fluid hand gestures that.. Expression cue: Maintains warm, conversational eye contact with subtle brow raises on key financial points, breaking into an easy, asymmetrical smile that.. Keep natural imperfections from the backstory visible: visible skin texture, small flyaways and an everyday hair finish. Do not airbrush, retouch, or over-style them. Subject looks directly at the camera with a natural conversational gaze, not a mannequin pose and not a front-on studio headshot. Tight chest-up framing with full face visibility and slight natural asymmetry. Keep the head, hairline, chin, and shoulder line fully in frame with minimal empty headroom. Keep the world grounded in believable everyday spend context from the backstory, not a polished retail campaign scene. Essential exclusions only: no readable text, no screens or devices, no cards or card-like objects, no celebrity or public-figure likeness.
